bird.name: Ochre-browed thistletail
bird.summary: The ochre-browed thistletail (Asthenes coryi) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is e…

locations.name: 特鲁希略州
locations.summary: 特魯希略州（西班牙語：Estado Trujillo）是委內瑞拉西部的一個州，西北臨馬拉開波湖。面積7,400平方公里，2007年人口711,400人。首府特魯希略。 1899年建州。下分二十個自治市。

locations.name: 塔奇拉州
locations.summary: 塔奇拉州（西班牙語：Estado Táchira）是委內瑞拉西南部的一個州，位於安第斯山脈上，西鄰哥倫比亞。面積11,100平方公里，2007年人口1,177,300人。首府聖克里斯托瓦爾。 1899年建州。下分二十九個自治市。

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Ochre-browed thistletail
relations.evidence: The ochre-browed thistletail is found in the Andes of western Venezuela between the states of Trujillo and Táchira

relations.subject: Ochre-browed thistletail
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits páramo grasslands, taller páramo vegetation, the upper edge of cloudforest, and dense undergrowth at tree line

relations.subject: Ochre-browed thistletail
relations.evidence: The principal threat is the habitat changes expected as a result of climate change. It is considered uncommon to fairly common but the "[l]inear nature of habitat occupied suggests that its total population is rather small"
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
